description: Robin's immune memory — the expected state of Oracle. When Robin detects a deviation, Robin fixes it. When Robin successfully fixes something new, Robin updates this file.

Tailscale.name: Tailscale
Tailscale.notes: VPN tunnel to family network. NEVER disable.

sshd.name: sshd
sshd.notes: OpenSSH Server — backup access. Firewall restricted to Tailscale subnet.

rustdesk.notes: Remote desktop. Zombies caused the 2026-03-27 cascade failure. Kill excess aggressively.

ollama.notes: Local LLM server. Robin's reasoning engine when offline.

RudyCommandRunner.notes: File-drop execution bridge. Alfred dispatches scripts through this.

RobinSentinel.notes: This agent. Runs at startup and continuously.

fortress_paradox.notes: Security measures must NEVER lock out the operator. Robin guards against this.

recovery_playbook.rustdesk_zombie: Kill all rustdesk.exe, copy canonical config, restart cleanly
recovery_playbook.tailscale_down: Restart Tailscale service, check network adapter, verify auth
recovery_playbook.ollama_down: Run 'ollama serve' as background process, wait 3s, verify port 11434
recovery_playbook.no_internet: Check network adapter, restart Tailscale, try DNS, enter offline mode if all fail
recovery_playbook.command_runner_stopped: Re-register scheduled task, verify rudy-commands directory exists
